mapper.insert: INSERT INTO collab.collaboration_command_events ( trip_id, actor_user_id, websocket_session_id, source, command_type, aggregate_type, aggregate_id, version_before, version_after, payload, inverse_payload, redo_payload, created_at ) VALUES ( #{event.tripId}, #{event.actorUserId}, #{event.websocketSessionId}, #{event.source}, #{event.commandType}, #{event.aggregateType}, #{event.aggregateId}, #{event.versionBefore}, #{event.versionAfter}, #{event.payload}::jsonb, #{event.inversePayload}::jsonb, #{event.redoPayload}::jsonb, #{event.createdAt} )
mapper.select: INSERT INTO collab.collaboration_command_events ( trip_id, actor_user_id, websocket_session_id, source, command_type, aggregate_type, aggregate_id, version_before, version_after, payload, inverse_payload, redo_payload, created_at ) VALUES ( #{event.tripId}, #{event.actorUserId}, #{event.websocketSessionId}, #{event.source}, #{event.commandType}, #{event.aggregateType}, #{event.aggregateId}, #{event.versionBefore}, #{event.versionAfter}, #{event.payload}::jsonb, #{event.inversePayload}::jsonb, #{event.redoPayload}::jsonb, #{event.createdAt} ) RETURNING id
mapper.sql: id, trip_id, actor_user_id, websocket_session_id, source, command_type, aggregate_type, aggregate_id, version_before, version_after, payload::text AS payload, inverse_payload::text AS inverse_payload, redo_payload::text AS redo_payload, created_at
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM collab.collaboration_command_events candidate WHERE candidate.trip_id = #{tripId} AND candidate.actor_user_id = #{actorUserId} AND candidate.websocket_session_id = #{websocketSessionId} AND (#{commandEventId,jdbcType=BIGINT} IS NULL OR candidate.id = #{commandEventId}) AND candidate.source IN ('USER', 'AI_TOOL', 'REDO') AND candidate.inverse_payload IS NOT NULL AND candidate.id IN ( SELECT recent.id FROM collab.collaboration_command_events recent WHERE recent.trip_id = #{tripId} AND recent.actor_user_id = #{actorUserId} AND recent.websocket_session_id = #{websocketSessionId} AND recent.source IN ('USER', 'AI_TOOL', 'REDO') AND recent.inverse_payload IS NOT NULL ORDER BY recent.created_at DESC, recent.id DESC LIMIT 5 ) AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM collab.collaboration_command_events undo_event WHERE undo_event.trip_id = candidate.trip_id AND undo_event.actor_user_id = candidate.actor_user_id AND undo_event.websocket_session_id = #{websocketSessionId} AND undo_event.source = 'UNDO' AND undo_event.payload ->> 'targetEventId' = candidate.id::text AND ( undo_event.created_at > candidate.created_at OR (undo_event.created_at = candidate.created_at AND undo_event.id > candidate.id) ) ) ORDER BY candidate.created_at DESC, candidate.id DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT
FROM collab.collaboration_command_events candidate WHERE candidate.trip_id = #{tripId} AND candidate.actor_user_id = #{actorUserId} AND candidate.websocket_session_id = #{websocketSessionId} AND (#{commandEventId,jdbcType=BIGINT} IS NULL OR candidate.id = #{commandEventId}) AND candidate.source = 'UNDO' AND candidate.redo_payload IS NOT NULL AND candidate.id IN ( SELECT recent.id FROM collab.collaboration_command_events recent WHERE recent.trip_id = #{tripId} AND recent.actor_user_id = #{actorUserId} AND recent.websocket_session_id = #{websocketSessionId} AND recent.source = 'UNDO' AND recent.redo_payload IS NOT NULL ORDER BY recent.created_at DESC, recent.id DESC LIMIT 5 ) AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM collab.collaboration_command_events newer_write WHERE newer_write.trip_id = candidate.trip_id AND newer_write.actor_user_id = candidate.actor_user_id AND newer_write.websocket_session_id = candidate.websocket_session_id AND newer_write.source IN ('USER', 'AI_TOOL') AND ( newer_write.created_at > candidate.created_at OR (newer_write.created_at = candidate.created_at AND newer_write.id > candidate.id) ) ) AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM collab.collaboration_command_events redo_event WHERE redo_event.trip_id = candidate.trip_id AND redo_event.actor_user_id = candidate.actor_user_id AND redo_event.websocket_session_id = #{websocketSessionId} AND redo_event.source = 'REDO' AND redo_event.payload ->> 'targetUndoEventId' = candidate.id::text AND ( redo_event.created_at > candidate.created_at OR (redo_event.created_at = candidate.created_at AND redo_event.id > candidate.id) ) ) ORDER BY candidate.created_at DESC, candidate.id DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM collab.collaboration_command_events candidate WHERE candidate.trip_id = #{tripId} AND candidate.actor_user_id = #{actorUserId} AND candidate.websocket_session_id = #{websocketSessionId} AND candidate.source = 'UNDO' AND candidate.redo_payload IS NOT NULL AND candidate.id IN ( SELECT recent.id FROM collab.collaboration_command_events recent WHERE recent.trip_id = #{tripId} AND recent.actor_user_id = #{actorUserId} AND recent.websocket_session_id = #{websocketSessionId} AND recent.source = 'UNDO' AND recent.redo_payload IS NOT NULL ORDER BY recent.created_at DESC, recent.id DESC LIMIT 5 ) AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM collab.collaboration_command_events newer_write WHERE newer_write.trip_id = candidate.trip_id AND newer_write.actor_user_id = candidate.actor_user_id AND newer_write.websocket_session_id = candidate.websocket_session_id AND newer_write.source IN ('USER', 'AI_TOOL') AND ( newer_write.created_at > candidate.created_at OR (newer_write.created_at = candidate.created_at AND newer_write.id > candidate.id) ) ) AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM collab.collaboration_command_events redo_event WHERE redo_event.trip_id = candidate.trip_id AND redo_event.actor_user_id = candidate.actor_user_id AND redo_event.websocket_session_id = #{websocketSessionId} AND redo_event.source = 'REDO' AND redo_event.payload ->> 'targetUndoEventId' = candidate.id::text AND ( redo_event.created_at > candidate.created_at OR (redo_event.created_at = candidate.created_at AND redo_event.id > candidate.id) ) ) )
